description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows release build that runs daily at 6am. The workflow should have a build job running on windows-2019 that checks out the repository, sets up the environment, installs dependencies including boost, configures and builds the project with various optional defines in a matrix, and archives the build. Additionally, create an upload job that downloads the build artifacts and uploads them as a release using the automatic-releases action. Finally, create a notify job that sends a Discord notification on failure.
